template.title: Superset Fronting Starter
template.summary: Template-suggested Superset API/MCP fronting structure with reviewed capability candidates.
template.description: Starts a governed Superset fronting project from reviewed starter data. Verify backend operations, auth posture, and policy boundaries against the real integration before locking.
template.recommendedBrief: Create a governed ANIP fronting layer for Superset. Expose selected behavior-shaped capabilities instead of raw backend operations. Read operations must preserve actor-visible scope. Write-adjacent operations must prepare previews or require approval before downstream mutation.

documents.title: Superset governed fronting intent
documents.content:
# Superset Governed Fronting Intent

> Imported from starter template `superset-fronting-starter`. Treat this as draft guidance, not discovered truth.

Expose a governed Superset capability surface in front of native API or MCP-backed operations.

## Template-suggested capabilities
- superset.analytics.discover_context: Discover allowed Superset datasets, charts, dashboards, metrics, and dimensions without exposing raw analytics tools.
- superset.analytics.answer_question: Answer an analytics question against allowed datasets and metrics using bounded chart-data or provider-owned semantic execution.
- superset.chart.preview.create: Create a Superset chart preview from governed metric, dimension, and visualization intent without saving it by default.
- superset.chart.publish.request: Request saving or updating a Superset chart from a reviewed preview.
- superset.dashboard.draft.prepare: Prepare a Superset dashboard draft or update proposal without publishing it.
- superset.dataset.draft.prepare: Prepare a virtual dataset or semantic dataset draft under governed data-scope constraints.

## Governance posture
- Raw Superset tools are not exposed directly to agents.
- Reads return bounded actor-visible context.
- Write-adjacent actions prepare previews or require explicit approval before execution.
- Missing required inputs trigger clarification instead of guessing.

documents.title: Superset integration evidence
documents.content:
# Superset Integration Evidence Template

> Imported from starter template `superset-fronting-starter`. Verify every operation against your chosen native API/MCP source before locking.

Native API connection: SUPERSET_API_URL
MCP connection: SUPERSET_MCP_ENDPOINT

## Template-suggested backend operations
- superset.api.list_datasets: GET /superset/analytics/context
- superset.api.list_charts: GET /superset/analytics/context
- superset.api.list_dashboards: GET /superset/analytics/context
- superset.api.get_dataset_info: GET /superset/analytics/context
- superset.api.chart_data: GET /superset/analytics/answer
- superset.api.get_dataset_info: GET /superset/analytics/answer
- superset.api.chart_preview: POST /superset/charts/preview
- superset.api.chart_data: POST /superset/charts/preview
- superset.api.create_chart: POST /superset/charts/publish-request
- superset.api.update_chart: POST /superset/charts/publish-request
- superset.api.create_dashboard: POST /superset/dashboards/draft
- superset.api.update_dashboard: POST /superset/dashboards/draft
- superset.api.get_database_info: POST /superset/datasets/draft
- superset.api.get_dataset_info: POST /superset/datasets/draft

## Secret posture
- Studio stores secret references only; project exports must not contain tokens.
- Teams can implement either native API or MCP backend seams behind the same governed ANIP contract.

documents.title: Superset developer evidence
documents.content:
# Superset Developer Evidence

Imported from starter template `superset-fronting-starter`. This is developer-owned evidence for Studio Autopilot and generated-service review.

This document turns starter operations into explicit ANIP runtime governance and input-contract evidence. Review it against the real integration before publishing.

## Capability Evidence Summary

| capability_id | service_id | operation_type | side_effect_level | inputs | backend_operation |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | ---: | --- |
| superset.analytics.discover_context | superset-fronting | read | read | 5 | superset.api.list_datasets; superset.api.list_charts; superset.api.list_dashboards; superset.api.get_dataset_info |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | superset-fronting | read | read | 8 | superset.api.chart_data; superset.api.get_dataset_info |
| superset.chart.preview.create | superset-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 8 | superset.api.chart_preview; superset.api.chart_data |
| superset.chart.publish.request | superset-governance | write | write_adjacent | 5 | superset.api.create_chart; superset.api.update_chart |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | superset-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 6 | superset.api.create_dashboard; superset.api.update_dashboard |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | superset-fronting | write | write_adjacent | 6 | superset.api.get_database_info; superset.api.get_dataset_info |

## Reviewed Developer Evidence

The starter also carries first-class `integration_fronting_capability_mapping` records. Use this document as readable developer evidence, not as the only machine-readable source.

### Runtime governance

| capability_id | execution_posture | intent_type | produces | does_not_produce |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| superset.analytics.discover_context | read_only | read_only | content.summary, data.read | raw_data_export, system.mutation |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | read_only | read_only | content.summary, data.read | raw_data_export, system.mutation |
| superset.chart.preview.create | prepare_only | prepare_only | approval.request, system.preview_mutation, content.draft | approval.execute, system.mutation, raw_data_export |
| superset.chart.publish.request | prepare_only | prepare_only | approval.request, system.preview_mutation, content.draft | approval.execute, system.mutation, raw_data_export |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | prepare_only | prepare_only | approval.request, system.preview_mutation, content.draft | approval.execute, system.mutation, raw_data_export |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | prepare_only | prepare_only | approval.request, system.preview_mutation, content.draft | approval.execute, system.mutation, raw_data_export |

### Input contracts

| capability_id | input | type | required | semantic_type | entity_reference |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| superset.analytics.discover_context | workspace_scope | string | yes | workspace_scope | no |
| superset.analytics.discover_context | query | string | yes | search_query | no |
| superset.analytics.discover_context | asset_type | string | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.discover_context | limit | integer | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.discover_context | backend_options | object | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | question | string | yes | analytics_question | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | dataset_ref | string | yes | dataset_ref | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | metric | string | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | dimension | string | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | time_window | string | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | filters | object | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | limit | integer | no |  | no |
| superset.analytics.answer_question | backend_options | object | no |  | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | dataset_ref | string | yes | dataset_ref | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | metric | string | yes | metric_ref | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | visualization_type | string | yes |  | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | dimension | string | no |  | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | time_window | string | no |  | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | filters | object | no |  | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | title | string | no |  | no |
| superset.chart.preview.create | backend_options | object | no |  | no |
| superset.chart.publish.request | chart_preview_ref | string | yes | chart_preview_ref | no |
| superset.chart.publish.request | dashboard_scope | string | yes | dashboard_scope | no |
| superset.chart.publish.request | reason | string | yes |  | no |
| superset.chart.publish.request | title | string | no |  | no |
| superset.chart.publish.request | backend_options | object | no |  | no |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | dashboard_scope | string | yes | dashboard_scope | no |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | objective | string | yes | business_objective | no |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | chart_refs | array<string> | yes | chart_ref | no |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | layout_hint | string | no |  | no |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | audience | string | no |  | no |
| superset.dashboard.draft.prepare | backend_options | object | no |  | no |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | database_ref | string | yes | database_ref | no |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | dataset_purpose | string | yes | dataset_purpose | no |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | query_intent | string | yes | query_intent | no |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | source_tables | array<string> | no |  | no |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | metrics | array<string> | no |  | no |
| superset.dataset.draft.prepare | backend_options | object | no |  | no |

# Superset Integration Evidence Template

> Imported from starter template `superset-fronting-starter`. Verify every operation against your chosen native API/MCP source before locking.

Native API connection: SUPERSET_API_URL
MCP connection: SUPERSET_MCP_ENDPOINT

## Template-suggested backend operations

- superset.api.list_charts: GET /superset/analytics/context

- superset.api.get_dataset_info: GET /superset/analytics/context

- superset.api.get_dataset_info: GET /superset/analytics/answer
- superset.api.chart_preview: POST /superset/charts/preview
- superset.api.chart_data: POST /superset/charts/preview
- superset.api.create_chart: POST /superset/charts/publish-request
- superset.api.update_chart: POST /superset/charts/publish-request
- superset.api.create_dashboard: POST /superset/dashboards/draft
- superset.api.update_dashboard: POST /superset/dashboards/draft
- superset.api.get_database_info: POST /superset/datasets/draft

## Secret posture
- Studio stores secret references only; project exports must not contain tokens.
- Teams can implement either native API or MCP backend seams behind the same governed ANIP contract.

# Superset Developer Evidence

| superset.analytics.answer_question | superset-fronting | read | read | 8 | superset.api.chart_data; superset.api.get_dataset_info |

data.title: Request Chart Publish
data.intent: Request saving or updating a Superset chart from a reviewed preview.

backend_bindings.status_detail: Template-suggested native API implementation seam. Review before locking.
No MCP operation was declared for this capability.

inputs.summary: Reviewed chart preview reference.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which reviewed chart preview should be saved.

inputs.summary: Allowed dashboard or workspace scope for the saved chart.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask where the chart should be published.

inputs.summary: Business reason for publishing the chart.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask why this chart should be saved or updated.

inputs.summary: Final chart title.
Bounded chart-save options. Must not bypass approval or dashboard scope.

data.title: Prepare Dashboard Draft
data.intent: Prepare a Superset dashboard draft or update proposal without publishing it.

backend_bindings.status_detail: Template-suggested native API implementation seam. Review before locking.

inputs.summary: Allowed dashboard, workspace, or team scope.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which dashboard scope should receive the draft.

inputs.summary: Business objective for the dashboard.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask what decision, review, or audience outcome the dashboard draft should support.

inputs.summary: Reviewed chart references to include.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which reviewed chart previews or existing charts should be included.

inputs.summary: Optional layout guidance.
Intended dashboard audience.
Bounded dashboard draft options. Must not publish without approval.

data.title: Prepare Dataset Draft
data.intent: Prepare a virtual dataset or semantic dataset draft under governed data-scope constraints.

backend_bindings.status_detail: Template-suggested native API implementation seam. Review before locking.
No MCP operation was declared for this capability.

inputs.summary: Allowed database reference.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask which approved database should back the dataset draft.

inputs.summary: Business purpose for the dataset or saved query.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask what governed business purpose the dataset draft should serve.

inputs.summary: Declarative query intent. Raw SQL is not accepted from agents by default.
inputs.clarification_hint: Ask for the query intent in business terms rather than accepting raw SQL.

inputs.summary: Approved source tables to use.
Approved metrics to define or expose.
Bounded dataset draft options. Must not allow arbitrary SQL execution.
